summary: Iteration 86: Tested anonymous form submissions for Travel and Care pages. All features working correctly after fixing pet_weight validation issue.

fixed.issue: Empty string pet_weight caused 422 validation error
fixed.fix: Added field_validator to convert empty strings to None for pet_weight field

test_results.travel_form_anonymous: PASS - Form submission works without login with manual pet entry
test_results.care_form_anonymous: PASS - Form submission works without login with manual pet entry
test_results.dine_products_count: PASS - API returns 22 products including fresh-meals category
test_results.stay_photo_urls_field: PASS - Photo URLs field exists in StayManager PropertyModal (lines 1502-1518)

test_credentials.test_user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / lola4304 (optional - forms work without login)

seed_data_creation: Created test travel and care requests with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anonymous form submissions for Travel and Care pages are fully functional. The pet_weight field validator was added to handle empty strings. All 9 pytest tests pass. StayManager Photo URLs field is present in the PropertyModal component.

travel_anonymous_submission.details: Users can submit cab/train/flight/relocation requests without login by entering pet name manually and providing contact details

care_anonymous_submission.details: Users can submit grooming/walks/training/vet_coordination/special_needs requests without login by entering pet name manually and providing contact details

dine_fresh_meals.details: Dine API returns 22 products including fresh-meals category. Fresh Pet Meals section visible on Dine page

stay_photo_urls.details: Photo URLs textarea field exists in StayManager PropertyModal (lines 1502-1518) with preview functionality
